clusters.title: State of Origin game one 2026 as it happened: Blues secure victory in series opener after controversial Kalyn Ponga send off
clusters.neutral_headline: Origin I looked over after 20 minutes. The Ponga send-off changed everything
bullet_summary: Reported by The Age, ABC Just In

items.title: State of Origin game one 2026 as it happened: Blues secure victory in series opener after controversial Kalyn Ponga send off
items.standfirst: The Blues secured a stunning 22-20 victory in game one of the 2026 State of Origin series with a James Tedesco try in the final minutes of the game after Kalyn Ponga was sent off in the 57th minute.
items.content: The Blues secured a stunning 22-20 victory in game one of the 2026 State of Origin series with a James Tedesco try in the final minutes of the game after Kalyn Ponga was sent off in the 57th minute.

items.title: Origin I looked over after 20 minutes. The Ponga send-off changed everything
items.standfirst: Even coach Laurie Daley looked stunned at full-time after NSW produced the greatest escape in State of Origin history.
items.content: Even coach Laurie Daley looked stunned at full-time after NSW produced the greatest escape in State of Origin history.

items.title: Tedesco stunner hands NSW the biggest comeback win in Origin history
items.standfirst: As a contest, it appeared over after 20 minutes. But a send-off and some James Tedesco magic has given NSW a 1-0 series lead.
items.content: As a contest, it appeared over after 20 minutes. But a send-off and some James Tedesco magic has given NSW a 1-0 series lead.

items.content: How we rated the performances of every player from the 2026 State of Origin series opener in Sydney.

items.title: Maroons let 20-0 lead slip in Origin I after Kalyn Ponga sent off late
items.standfirst: James Tedesco scores a spectacular try with 90 seconds left in State of Origin I, capping off a 20-point comeback after Queensland fullback Kalyn Ponga is sent off for a shoulder charge.
items.content: James Tedesco scores a spectacular try with 90 seconds left in State of Origin I, capping off a 20-point comeback after Queensland fullback Kalyn Ponga is sent off for a shoulder charge.
